title: Copy the pasting outside of Monday!

posts.author: Ryde.Garnish (Harry)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature I would like to see. At the job I work for I find myself having to individually copy and paste each email I would like to contact on a very large leads sheet. I wish there was a way like in excel or google sheets where you could highlight what cells you wanted then paste them into a email.
